label: Planetary Remedies
description: Specific masala remedies to strengthen, balance or remove doshas of planets

remedies.title: Remove Shani Dosh — Coconut in Running Water
process: Go to a running water body.
Chant the mantra given.
As you're chanting immerse the coconut in the running water.
remedies.note: In case there is no body of running water, then collect the coconut in a bag/box outside your home. After all 7 coconuts are ready to be immersed, then plan a trip where there is a river and immerse all 7 coconuts together.

remedies.title: Remove Shani Dosh — Coriander & Peepal
process: Fill water in the glass.
Add coriander seeds.
Offer this water to the roots of peepal tree.

remedies.title: Balance and Enhance Venus — Fennel Seeds
process: Consume Fennel Seeds in any form to balance and enhance Venus.

remedies.title: Support Mars — Fennel Seeds & Jaggery
remedies.purpose: Support Mars — to Finish Incomplete Work
process: When going outside eat Fennel Seeds mixed with Jaggery.

remedies.title: Boost Mercury — Barley
process: Consume barley to enhance and support Mercury.

remedies.title: Balance Rahu & Ketu — Green Cardamom Milk
process: Boil 1 green cardamom in milk.
Drink this milk everyday.

remedies.title: Balance Rahu & Ketu — Green Cardamom Milk
process: Boil 1 green cardamom in milk.
Drink this milk everyday.

remedies.title: Pitra Dosh — Cinnamon Diya for Ancestors
remedies.purpose: Make Ancestors Happy and Remove Pitra Dosh
remedies.timing: Do every day for as long as possible; if possible, throughout one's life
ingredients: A ghee diya or a candle
Cinnamon essential oil or cinnamon powder
process: Put a few drops of cinnamon essential oil in the diya or anoint your candle with the essential oil or powder.
Set the intention to thank your ancestors for their presence in your life, also ask them for forgiveness and blessings.
Light this diya in the south west zone of your house.
benefits: Helps in removing pitra dosh or ancestral issue
Helps in improving situations where everything seems to be ok and yet nothing seems to work
Creates a strong sense of contentment
remedies.note: The south west is the direction of ancestors. One can also keep this diya in the south or the west in case south west direction is not possible.

remedies.title: Results Despite Hard Work — Jasmine Diya Ritual
remedies.purpose: Get Results When Hard Work Isn't Yielding Outcomes
process: Make a diya using jasmine oil and cotton wick.
Add 2 cloves in it.
Light the diya in front of Hanuman ji.
Sit in front of Hanuman ji and tell him your problems and ask for help.
Do 7 recitations of Hanuman Chalisa.
